dtuHostHelp: IP address or hostname of the inverter's integrated DTU
hostRequired: IP address or hostname is required
pollIntervalHelp: Time between data queries in seconds (default: 30)
cloudPauseHelp: Periodically disconnects so the DTU can upload data to the Hoymiles cloud
cloudPauseDurationHelp: Duration of connection pause for cloud upload (default: 40s)
cloudInfo: The TCP connection to the DTU blocks cloud uploads. If you want to continue using the Hoymiles cloud, enable the cloud pause.
